retry_reason: The function is a release callback invoked exactly once when the final reference is dropped. It is not designed to fail or be retried; retry would mean double-free.
contract_summary: This is the kref release callback for batadv_orig_ifinfo objects. It is called when the last reference is dropped, and it is responsible for releasing references to the outgoing interface (if non-default) and the router neigh_node, and finally freeing the orig_ifinfo structure via kfree_rcu. There is no return value; the function must not be called directly except via kref_put. After this function executes, the orig_ifinfo object is freed and must not be accessed. Callers (the kref subsystem) ensure that no other references exist before invoking this release.
